title: Phase 3 — Owen + safety
summary: Phase plan and task breakdown for extending the household agent to a child role with content filter, time-window enforcement, and external-comms hard-deny.
notes: Phase planning document with task list (T-3.1–T-3.5), TDD pairs, demo path, and completion criteria. No frontmatter, no ADR Decision/Consequences structure, no user-story PRD form, no API/schema SPEC tables — closest fit is DOC (project planning/roadmap). Contains implicit requirements (child role hard-denies, time windows, audit) that synthesizer may want to surface despite DOC tag.
